data.title: CSN announces its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Companhia Siderúrgica Nacional (NYSE: SID, B3: CSNA3) submitted its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This report contains crucial information for shareholders and holders of the company's securities.

data.title: White House Historical Association to Unveil Historic Norman Rockwell Artwork at The People's House: A White House Experience
data.description: A new exhibit titled "So You Want to See the President!" is set to premiere on June 25, 2026, in honor of America's 250th Anniversary Year. The White House Historical Association revealed this news on April 30, 2026. The exhibit will showcase a significant piece by Norman Rockwell at The People's House, commemorating this milestone year.
APPLE CFO: THE COMPANY IS "FOLLOWING THE NORMAL PROCESS" IN PURSUING TARIFF REFUNDS AND WILL REINVEST ANY RECOVERED AMOUNTS INTO ITS US ADVANCED MANUFACTURING PROGRAM.

data.title: Big Oil Earnings Set To Sharply Decline. Blame This Tug-Of-War.
data.description: Discussion surrounding tensions in Iran and Venezuela might be just as significant as the financial performance of major oil companies like Chevron and Exxon. The oil industry stocks have seen important thresholds being tested. The upcoming earnings reports for major oil companies are projected to show a significant decrease. This decrease is attributed to the challenging dynamics caused by the geopolitical situations in Iran and Venezuela.

data.title: Apple Tops March-Quarter Targets On Strong iPhone 17 Sales
data.description: In the fiscal second quarter, Apple surpassed expectations with strong sales of the iPhone 17. Despite this success, the company's stock saw a decline in after-hours trading.

data.title: Twilio Stock Pops On Q1 Earnings Beat, Strong Guidance
data.description: Twilio's stock surged after the company reported better-than-expected earnings and revenue for the first quarter. The revenue exceeded estimates, and the sales forecast for the June quarter also surpassed expectations, leading to a positive market response. The post-earnings report showed a significant increase in Twilio's stock value due to the strong performance and optimistic guidance.

data.title: Axsome Hits Record High On Alzheimer's Agitation Approval
data.description: Axsome Pharmaceuticals saw a remarkable surge in its stock prices, reaching a new peak following the FDA's authorization of Auvelity for the treatment of agitation associated with Alzheimer's disease. This milestone approval led to the stock hitting a record high on Thursday. The approval signifies a significant development for Axsome, as investors responded positively to this news. The FDA's nod for Auvelity highlights its potential in addressing agitation related to Alzheimer's, making it a crucial medication in this field. However, the details of the extent and impact of this approval on the company's stock value were not provided.

data.title: Red-Hot AI Stock Western Digital Slides Late Despite Earnings Beat
data.description: In the last year, the stock of WDC has experienced a significant increase of almost 900%. Despite exceeding earnings projections, the post-earnings surge did not continue for the AI stock Western Digital, as it slid down late.

data.title: Amgen's Numbers Are Out: It Gets To Keep Its Cholesterol Crown — For Now
data.description: Amgen exceeded the first-quarter expectations on Thursday by a significant margin, leading to a slight increase in its 2026 guidance. The company's strong performance solidified its position as the leader in the cholesterol market.

data.title: Google Stock Soars On Q1 Earnings As Analysts Trumpet 'Full Stack' AI Platform
data.description: Alphabet, Google's parent company, reported strong Q1 earnings which resulted in a rise in Google stock. The increase was fueled by robust growth in cloud computing and search ads, along with significant investments in artificial intelligence (AI). Analysts praised Alphabet's 'Full Stack' AI Platform.
YD Bio Limited Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results

data.title: Hut 8 Closes $3.25 Billion of Investment-Grade Senior Secured Notes in Landmark Financing for River Bend Data Center Project
data.description: Hut 8 Corp recently announced a groundbreaking data center project that will be the first of its kind to be funded through investment-grade construction bonds from a single sponsor. This move is expected to set a new standard in the industry, as the 16.5-year tenor of the bonds ensures full amortization and eliminates the need for refinancing. Notably, this financing approach allows for the development to proceed without relying on Hut 8 or burdening shareholders with dilution. The innovative project is set to revolutionize the funding structure for data center initiatives, offering a secure and sustainable financial model for the long term.

data.title: AIxCrypto Announces Strategic Collaboration Framework with Chutes AI to Support AI Agent Infrastructure Scaling
data.description: AIxCrypto Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AIXC), a tech company based in Los Angeles, is currently looking into decentralized compute infrastructure to improve the real-time performance of AI agents and enhance platform scalability. The company, listed on Nasdaq, is working on a three-layer system to elevate AI capabilities. The update was released on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Robert Half Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: A company based in Menlo Park, California, Robert Half Inc. (NYSE: RHI), shared news on April 30, 2026, declaring a quarterly cash dividend of $0.59 per share for its common stock. The dividend will be paid out on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close.
